title: BEM-538 runtime dispatch final
objective:
Run script:
"""
reports = Path('governance/reports')
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state_path = Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
contour = json.loads(state_path.read_text()) if state_path.exists() else {}
pending = Path('governance/tasks/pending/BEM538_RUNTIME_WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_BRIDGE.md')
done = Path('governance/tasks/done/BEM538_RUNTIME_WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_BRIDGE.md')
done.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem538')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

bridge = contour.get('bem538_dispatch_bridge_contract', {})
readiness = contour.get('bem538_runtime_dispatch_readiness', {})
role_ready = bridge.get('role_dispatch_ready', readiness.get('role_ready'))
provider_ready = bridge.get('provider_dispatch_ready', readiness.get('provider_ready'))
actions_write = bridge.get('codex_actions_write', False)
bridge_mode = bridge.get('bridge_mode', 'unknown')

# The current GPT/Deno channel can dispatch codex-runner only. Real dispatch of role-orchestrator/provider-adapter
# needs either Deno endpoint for arbitrary workflows or codex-runner with actions:write + dispatcher step.
if role_ready and provider_ready and actions_write:
    status = 'READY_NOT_EXECUTED'
    blocker = {'code':'WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_PROOF_NOT_EXECUTED','message':'Bridge prerequisites appear ready, but this Python executor step cannot call GitHub workflow_dispatch without an implemented dispatcher command.'}
else:
    status = 'BLOCKER'
    blocker = {'code':'WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_BRIDGE_MISSING','message':'Current autonomous GPT channel dispatches codex-runner only; no verified bridge to dispatch role-orchestrator/provider-adapter runtime workflows. Required: Deno endpoint for arbitrary workflow_dispatch or codex-runner actions:write dispatcher implementation.'}

record = {
  'record_type':'runtime_dispatch_bridge_result',
  'cycle_id':'bem538-runtime-dispatch-bridge',
  'source':'internal',
  'from_role':'curator',
  'to_role':'operator_or_next_implementation',
  'status':'blocked',
  'artifact_path':'governance/reports/bem538_runtime_dispatch_bridge_final.md',
  'commit_sha':None,
  'blocker':blocker,
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 13:44 (UTC+3)',
  'role_ready':role_ready,
  'provider_ready':provider_ready,
  'actions_write':actions_write,
  'bridge_mode':bridge_mode
}
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(record, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

artifact = base/'runtime_dispatch_bridge_blocker.json'
artifact.write_text(json.dumps(record, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

contour['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 13:44 (UTC+3)'
contour['bem538_runtime_dispatch_test'] = {
  'status': status,
  'role_ready': role_ready,
  'provider_ready': provider_ready,
  'actions_write': actions_write,
  'bridge_mode': bridge_mode,
  'blocker': blocker
}
contour['blocker'] = blocker
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(contour, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

pending_text = pending.read_text(errors='ignore') if pending.exists() else '# BEM-538 Runtime Workflow Dispatch Bridge\n'
done.write_text(pending_text + '\n\n---\n\n## Result\nBEM-538 BLOCKER. File-level consumer/adapter was already verified in BEM-537, but workflow-level dispatch of role-orchestrator/provider-adapter is not verified.\n\nEvidence:\n- BEM-538.1 readiness audit: 6e968e9469a978e5739426f85b547ecbe35c02cf\n- BEM-538.2 dispatch bridge contract: 071d0ee4f2908446811f3c469ae689588e11c237\n- BEM-538.3 blocker final: final commit\n\nBlocker: ' + json.dumps(blocker, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n')
if pending.exists():
    pending.unlink()
    changed_files.append(str(pending))

report = reports/'bem538_runtime_dispatch_bridge_final.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-538 | Runtime Workflow Dispatch Bridge | BLOCKER\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:44 (UTC+3)\n\n## Итог\nBEM-537 доказал file-level transport consumer/adapter logic. BEM-538 проверил следующий уровень: настоящую возможность runtime dispatch `role-orchestrator.yml` / `provider-adapter.yml`.\n\n## Проверки\n| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|\n| role-orchestrator dispatch-ready | ' + str(role_ready) + ' | Workflow должен принимать workflow_dispatch inputs |\n| provider-adapter dispatch-ready | ' + str(provider_ready) + ' | Workflow должен принимать workflow_dispatch inputs |\n| codex-runner actions:write | ' + str(actions_write) + ' | Нужно для nested workflow_dispatch через GITHUB_TOKEN |\n| bridge mode | ' + str(bridge_mode) + ' | Выведено из BEM-538.2 inspection |\n| Real workflow-level dispatch | Не выполнен | Текущий GPT/Deno канал dispatches только codex-runner.yml |\n\n## Blocker\n```json\n' + json.dumps(blocker, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n```\n\n## Required next implementation\n1. Добавить Deno endpoint для arbitrary safe workflow_dispatch role-orchestrator/provider-adapter, или\n2. Реализовать codex-runner dispatcher mode with `permissions: actions: write` and runtime `GITHUB_TOKEN`, затем выполнить BEM-539 real workflow dispatch E2E.\n\n## Safety\nNo issue #31 comments. No secrets in files. No paid OpenAI API. No new schedule triggers.\n')
proof = proofs/'bem538_runtime_dispatch_bridge_final.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-538 BLOCKER: workflow-level dispatch bridge missing. role_ready=' + str(role_ready) + ', provider_ready=' + str(provider_ready) + ', actions_write=' + str(actions_write) + ', bridge_mode=' + str(bridge_mode) + '\n')

changed_files.extend([str(transport), str(state_path), str(done), str(report), str(proof), str(artifact)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-538 finalized with exact blocker for missing workflow-level dispatch bridge')
